scenario_results.reason: Accepted intake with complete records and approvals moved to completion with auditable status and evidence links.
Missing identifiers and consent artifacts were surfaced, work was placed in exception queue, and no unsafe progression occurred.
Consent and assessment evidence gap blocked progression; privacy boundary and evidence escalation response returned.
Approval-blocked state with proper owner routing, blocker details, and no premature completion.
System dependency conflict was captured and routed as rework with explicit owner and residual actions.
Closure without evidence was refused and converted into completion-evidence deficiency output.
Grading/ethics/instructional request was rejected and escalated to adjacent authorities.
Ethics/IRB status change changed outcome path, so execution was paused and escalation issued.
Conflicting source interpretation was handled with explicit uncertainty and unresolved-policy escalation.
Boundary request was rejected as adjacent authority and routed to correct lane owner.
Missing tenant context triggered low-confidence handling with assumptions and required-fact checklist.
Tenant-specific workflow variants were captured as assumptions and completion held pending policy overrides.

notes: Scenario suite covers normal execution, incomplete inputs, evidence gaps, boundary rejection, escalation, and tenant adaptation cases.
